@graph.name: Materials Cloud
@graph.description: Materials Cloud is an open science platform providing curated computational materials data and tools for reproducible research.

@graph.name: MC3D - Materials Cloud 3D Crystals Database
@graph.description: Curated set of computationally relaxed three-dimensional crystal structures derived from experimental crystallographic databases.

@graph.name: MC3D - 3D Crystals Database
@graph.description: A curated database of computationally relaxed three-dimensional crystal structures based on raw data from experimental crystallographic sources.
